ideation: This animation sequence simulates reaching for something high up.  The robot will extend both arms upwards, then slightly lower them to show a gesture of pointing or indicating something above.  The final frame shows a return to a neutral position. This upward motion mimics the direction of the top arrow emoji.

frames.beat: both arms reach straight up, aiming for the top
arms bend slightly, pointing to something just above
arms drop to rest, the point has been made
